prestazioni: AMG M177 4.0L V8 Biturbo (engine code: M177 DE40 AL) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ ECU remap, targeting 750 HP and 850 lb-ft of torque via custom fueling maps and optimized turbo spool for the 6x6's unique drivetrain load

Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (dual setup) with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducers, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegates to handle the M177's increased airflow demands under extreme off-road conditions

KW Suspensions 6x6-specific 3-way adjustable coilover system with remote reservoirs, 400mm travel front/rear, and reinforced spherical bearings to accommodate the portal axles and 3,850 kg curb weight
estetica: RML Group 6x6 carbon fiber widebody kit with integrated rock sliders, designed to clear 40-inch Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires (37x13.5R20) while maintaining approach/departure angles
Brabus 6x6-specific front grille with illuminated AMG crest and custom LED light bar integration, replacing the stock bumper with a reinforced steel skid plate for extreme off-road protection
Rotiform LAS-R 20x12 forged wheels with beadlock rings, finished in Satin Black with custom offset (-12mm) to clear the portal axles and 6x6's 2,100mm track width
